expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “1) … Case focus is explicitly covered”, the output explicitly separates “Contextual-link styling/affordance …” from “Ordinary/non-link grid cell rendering …” and ties this to the feature evidence (“blue/underlined hyperlink styling + indicator icon” vs non-link cells should not appear like a hyperlink).

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md declares “Primary phase under test - phase4a” and then lists phase4a alignment requirements (“Subcategory-only… Scenario-driven… Atomic nested action chain… Observable verification leaves”) and assesses alignment, emphasizing no Phase 4b canonical/top-category grouping.
